name: SQL Transformer
shortDescription: Transform data using SQL queries powered by DuckDB
description: Executes SQL transformations using DuckDB. Loads input dependencies as tables, runs your SQL query, and exports results to S3 in Parquet, CSV, or JSON format.
inputDescription: Input data files to load as DuckDB tables

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this transformer node in the pipeline

sql.label: SQL Query
sql.description: SQL query to execute. Input tables are available by their dependency names.
